phases.name: Validate deployment plan
phases.detail: The versioned plan contains no secret values.

phases.name: Check release identity
phases.detail: Verified ApiaryLens 0.1.0-rc.1 and its pinned manifest SHA-256.

phases.name: Verify Cloudflare account access
phases.detail: The runtime token is valid and was not written to disk.

phases.name: Review guarded cost profile
phases.detail: The deployment uses named family resources and does not enable paid platform features.

diagnostics.privacyStatement: Diagnostics contain phase results and plan identity but no runtime credentials.

scope: Released Windows executable and secured loopback executor; isolated Cloudflare dry-run preflight only. No deployment was applied.
